name: Lifeline

active.name: Soul Anchor
active.effects: Mark your current location. After 4 seconds, you automatically {{tip|blink}} to the marked location after a {{fd|0.5}}-second delay. ''Soul Anchor'' may be recast within its duration to manually blink to the marked location after the same delay (45 second cooldown, starts after the blink).

effects_structured.raw: After 4 seconds, you automatically {{tip blink}} to the marked location after a {{fd 0.5}}-second delay
''Soul Anchor'' may be recast within its duration to manually blink to the marked location after the same delay (45 second cooldown, starts after the blink).

simpleDescription: Marks the ground, and returns you there after a few moments

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Soul Anchor stores a return location, then enforces a 4-second return window with either automatic timeout return or manual recast return.
Player-visible behavior: both automatic and recast returns include a 0.5-second blink windup; the 45-second cooldown starts after blink resolution.
Special-case interactions with displacement/channel/crowd-control states are not fully encoded and remain a fidelity follow-up area.
